steps.t: Blackthorn has chosen to ignore the needs of the Rohirrim, but at least you can assure Herehasen that the shadows of Fangorn will not harm his people.…
Herehasen is at Tordag's camp in the Broadacres, south of the eaves of Fangorn. Blackthorn sent you back to Herehasen with his refusal to help the Roh…
